test_messages.message: I want to cancel my order
My device is not working and broken
I want to talk to a human agent

suggestion_engine.refund: We are sorry for the inconvenience...
suggestion_engine.cancel: We understand you'd like to cancel...
suggestion_engine.shipping: Your order is on its way...
suggestion_engine.payment: We're sorry you're facing a payment issue...
suggestion_engine.wrong: We're sorry you received the wrong item...
suggestion_engine.hello: Hello! How can we assist you today?
suggestion_engine.hi: Hi there! How can we help you?
suggestion_engine.help: We are here to help! Please describe your issue.
suggestion_engine.order: Please share your order ID and we will look into it.
suggestion_engine.late: We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the delay.
suggestion_engine.angry: We sincerely apologize for your experience.
suggestion_engine.waiting: We appreciate your patience, we are working on it.
suggestion_engine.complaint: We take all complaints seriously and will resolve this.
